hooks.name: deployment-window
hooks.description: Enforce time-based deployment restrictions for regulatory compliance. Prevents deployments during high-risk periods such as market trading hours (FSI), peak patient care hours (Healthcare), holiday shopping peaks (Retail), and peak demand hours (Energy). Includes emergency override mechanism with approval and audit trail.

action.command:
#!/bin/bash
set -e

echo "🕐 Step 1: Checking deployment window..."
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP="${KIRO_TIMESTAMP:-$(date -u +'%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')}"
TIMEZONE="${DEPLOYMENT_WINDOW_TIMEZONE:-America/New_York}"
echo "Current time: $CURRENT_TIMESTAMP"
echo "Configured timezone: $TIMEZONE"
echo ""

CURRENT_DATE=$(echo "$CURRENT_TIMESTAMP" | cut -d'T' -f1)
CURRENT_TIME=$(echo "$CURRENT_TIMESTAMP" | cut -d'T' -f2 | cut -d'Z' -f1 | cut -d':' -f1-2)
CURRENT_DAY=$(date -j -f "%Y-%m-%d" "$CURRENT_DATE" +"%A" 2>/dev/null || date -d "$CURRENT_DATE" +"%A" 2>/dev/null || echo "Monday")

echo "Date: $CURRENT_DATE ($CURRENT_DAY)"
echo "Time: $CURRENT_TIME $TIMEZONE"
echo ""

echo "🚫 Step 2: Checking blocked windows..."
BLOCKED=false
BLOCK_REASON=""

if [[ "$TIMEZONE" == "America/New_York" ]] && [[ "$CURRENT_DAY" =~ ^(Monday|Tuesday|Wednesday|Thursday|Friday)$ ]]; then
  HOUR=$(echo "$CURRENT_TIME" | cut -d':' -f1 | sed 's/^0//')
  MINUTE=$(echo "$CURRENT_TIME" | cut -d':' -f2 | sed 's/^0//')
  TIME_NUM=$((HOUR*60 + MINUTE))
  
  if (( TIME_NUM >= 570 && TIME_NUM < 960 )); then
    BLOCKED=true
    BLOCK_REASON="Market Trading Hours (09:30-16:00 ET) - Active trading period"
  fi
  
  if (( TIME_NUM >= 960 && TIME_NUM < 1080 )); then
    BLOCKED=true
    BLOCK_REASON="Settlement Processing (16:00-18:00 ET) - Critical financial operations"
  fi
fi

if [[ "$BLOCKED" == "true" ]]; then
  echo "⛔ BLOCKED: Deployment window is restricted"
  echo "Reason: $BLOCK_REASON"
  echo ""
else
  echo "✅ No blocked windows apply"
  echo ""
fi

echo "📅 Step 3: Checking restricted dates..."
RESTRICTED=false
RESTRICT_REASON=""

case "$CURRENT_DATE" in
  "2025-03-31") RESTRICTED=true; RESTRICT_REASON="Q1 End - Financial reporting period" ;;
  "2025-06-30") RESTRICTED=true; RESTRICT_REASON="Q2 End - Financial reporting period" ;;
  "2025-09-30") RESTRICTED=true; RESTRICT_REASON="Q3 End - Financial reporting period" ;;
  "2025-12-31") RESTRICTED=true; RESTRICT_REASON="Year End - Financial reporting and audit period" ;;
  "2025-04-15") RESTRICTED=true; RESTRICT_REASON="Tax Day - High volume for financial services" ;;
  "2025-11-28") RESTRICTED=true; RESTRICT_REASON="Thanksgiving - Market closed" ;;
  "2025-12-25") RESTRICTED=true; RESTRICT_REASON="Christmas - Market closed" ;;
esac

if [[ "$RESTRICTED" == "true" ]]; then
  echo "⛔ RESTRICTED: Deployment date is blocked"
  echo "Reason: $RESTRICT_REASON"
  echo ""
else
  echo "✅ No date restrictions apply"
  echo ""
fi

echo "🚨 Step 4: Checking for emergency override..."
EMERGENCY_OVERRIDE_REQUESTED="${DEPLOYMENT_WINDOW_EMERGENCY:-false}"
EMERGENCY_JUSTIFICATION="${DEPLOYMENT_WINDOW_JUSTIFICATION:-}"

if [[ "$EMERGENCY_OVERRIDE_REQUESTED" == "true" ]]; then
  echo "⚠️  Emergency override requested"
  echo "Justification: $EMERGENCY_JUSTIFICATION"
  echo ""
  
  if [[ "${DEPLOYMENT_WINDOW_EMERGENCY_APPROVED:-false}" == "true" ]]; then
    echo "✅ Emergency override APPROVED"
    echo "Proceeding with deployment despite window restrictions..."
    echo ""
    BLOCKED=false
    RESTRICTED=false
    
    echo "🔍 AUDIT: Emergency deployment override" >> deployment-audit.log
    echo "  Timestamp: $CURRENT_TIMESTAMP" >> deployment-audit.log
    echo "  Justification: $EMERGENCY_JUSTIFICATION" >> deployment-audit.log
    echo "  Approved by: ${DEPLOYMENT_WINDOW_APPROVER:-UNKNOWN}" >> deployment-audit.log
    echo "  Files changed: ${KIRO_CHANGED_FILES:-}" >> deployment-audit.log
    echo "" >> deployment-audit.log
  else
    echo "❌ Emergency override NOT approved"
    echo "Deployment will be blocked or queued"
    echo ""
  fi
else
  echo "ℹ️  No emergency override requested"
  echo ""
fi

if [[ "$BLOCKED" == "true" ]] || [[ "$RESTRICTED" == "true" ]]; then
  echo "⏸️  Step 5: Deployment blocked - queueing for later execution"
  echo ""
  
  if [[ "$BLOCKED" == "true" ]]; then
    echo "Next available window:"
    echo "  - After 18:00 ET today (post-settlement)"
    echo "  - OR before 09:30 ET on next business day (pre-market)"
    echo "  - OR weekends (Saturday/Sunday)"
    echo ""
  fi
  
  if [[ "$RESTRICTED" == "true" ]]; then
    echo "Date restriction active until: End of day $CURRENT_DATE"
    echo "Next available date: Next business day"
    echo ""
  fi
  
  QUEUE_ENABLED="${DEPLOYMENT_WINDOW_QUEUE:-true}"
  
  if [[ "$QUEUE_ENABLED" == "true" ]]; then
    echo "✅ Deployment queued for next available window"
    echo ""
    echo "Queued deployment details:"
    echo "  Queue ID: deploy-$(date +%s)"
    echo "  Files: ${KIRO_CHANGED_FILES:-}"
    echo "  Requested at: $CURRENT_TIMESTAMP"
    echo "  Requested by: ${KIRO_USER:-unknown}"
    echo "  Auto-deploy: ${DEPLOYMENT_WINDOW_AUTO_DEPLOY:-false}"
    echo ""
    
    echo "🔍 AUDIT: Deployment queued due to window restriction" >> deployment-audit.log
    echo "  Timestamp: $CURRENT_TIMESTAMP" >> deployment-audit.log
    echo "  Block reason: $BLOCK_REASON$RESTRICT_REASON" >> deployment-audit.log
    echo "  Files changed: ${KIRO_CHANGED_FILES:-}" >> deployment-audit.log
    echo "" >> deployment-audit.log
    
    exit 2
  else
    echo "❌ Deployment queueing is disabled"
    echo "Deployment BLOCKED"
    exit 2
  fi
fi

echo "✅ Step 6: Deployment window is open - proceeding with deployment"
echo ""
echo "Deployment approved for:"
echo "  Date: $CURRENT_DATE"
echo "  Time: $CURRENT_TIME $TIMEZONE"
echo "  Files: ${KIRO_CHANGED_FILES:-}"
echo ""

DEPLOYMENT_COMMAND="${DEPLOYMENT_COMMAND:-echo 'No deployment command configured'}"
echo "Executing deployment..."
eval "$DEPLOYMENT_COMMAND"
DEPLOY_STATUS=$?

echo ""
if [[ $DEPLOY_STATUS -eq 0 ]]; then
  echo "✅ Deployment completed successfully"
else
  echo "❌ Deployment failed with status: $DEPLOY_STATUS"
fi
echo ""

echo "📝 Step 7: Generating audit trail..."
echo ""

echo "🔍 AUDIT: Production deployment executed" >> deployment-audit.log
echo "  Timestamp: $CURRENT_TIMESTAMP" >> deployment-audit.log
echo "  Status: $([ $DEPLOY_STATUS -eq 0 ] && echo 'SUCCESS' || echo 'FAILED')" >> deployment-audit.log
echo "  Deployment window: ALLOWED (outside blocked windows and restricted dates)" >> deployment-audit.log
echo "  Files changed: ${KIRO_CHANGED_FILES:-}" >> deployment-audit.log
echo "  Executed by: ${KIRO_USER:-unknown}" >> deployment-audit.log
echo "  Exit code: $DEPLOY_STATUS" >> deployment-audit.log
echo "" >> deployment-audit.log

echo "Audit trail updated: deployment-audit.log"
echo ""
echo "Deployment window enforcement complete."

exit $DEPLOY_STATUS

metadata.purpose: Enforce time-based deployment restrictions for regulatory compliance. Prevents deployments during high-risk periods (market hours, business hours). Queues deployments for allowed windows with emergency override mechanism.
requirements: 11.2: Enforce time-based deployment restrictions and queue deployments
11.5: Include audit trail logging for deployments
15.2: Clear customization points with inline guidance
metadata.addresses: Primary Concern #9: FSI Regulatory Complexity - OCC/FDIC/Fed/SEC requirements for change control

required: Configure DEPLOYMENT_WINDOWS for your regulatory requirements (FSI market hours, Healthcare peak hours, Retail holidays, Energy peak demand)
Set TIMEZONE for deployment window evaluation (America/New_York, America/Los_Angeles, UTC, Europe/London, Asia/Tokyo)
Configure RESTRICTED_DAYS for blackout periods (quarter ends, regulatory filing deadlines, high-traffic events)
Set DEPLOYMENT_COMMAND for your deployment tool (CDK, Terraform, SAM, Serverless, kubectl, etc.)
optional: Emergency override mechanism: EMERGENCY_APPROVERS, EMERGENCY_NOTIFICATION, AUDIT_TRAIL_LOCATION

environment_variables.DEPLOYMENT_WINDOW_EMERGENCY: Set to 'true' to request emergency override
environment_variables.DEPLOYMENT_WINDOW_EMERGENCY_APPROVED: Set to 'true' to approve emergency override
environment_variables.DEPLOYMENT_WINDOW_APPROVER: Name of approver for emergency override

blocked_windows_examples.retail: Black Friday, Cyber Monday, Holiday shopping peak (Dec 20-26)

restricted_dates_default: 2025-12-31: Year End - Financial reporting and audit period
2025-04-15: Tax Day - High volume for financial services
workflow_integration: promote-to-staging.json - Staging deployments can proceed during blocked windows
cascade-api-change.json - API changes trigger deployment window validation

dora_metrics_impact.deployment_frequency: Controlled but optimized within allowed windows
dora_metrics_impact.change_failure_rate: Reduced by avoiding high-risk deployment periods
dora_metrics_impact.time_to_restore: Emergency override enables rapid incident response

compliance: SOX 404: Audit trail of all deployments with approval gates
API documentation often required for SOC 2, ISO 27001
FSI regulations: Combine with deployment restrictions for production
best_practices: Align windows with organization's peak risk periods
Document business justification for each blocked window
Review and update quarterly as business needs change
Require clear justification for emergency overrides (incident ticket, P1/P2 severity)
Limit approvers to senior technical leadership
Send real-time notifications to all stakeholders
Conduct post-incident review of all emergency overrides
Set reasonable queue expiration (24-48 hours max)
Store audit trail in centralized logging system (CloudWatch, Splunk, Datadog)
Retain for regulatory period (7 years for SOX 404)

troubleshooting.deployment_blocked_when_should_be_open: Verify TIMEZONE configuration, check system time, ensure KIRO_TIMESTAMP is UTC format
troubleshooting.emergency_override_not_working: Verify all three env vars set (EMERGENCY, JUSTIFICATION, EMERGENCY_APPROVED)
troubleshooting.queued_deployments_not_executing: Check auto_deploy_when_window_opens setting, verify queue hasn't expired
troubleshooting.timezone_conversion_errors: Use IANA timezone names (America/New_York not EST/EDT), account for DST
